overall.description: A third-person game scene following a female character with a long coat and ponytail walking through a foggy marsh at night. She passes wooden fences and ancient stone castle ruins before climbing a grassy ridge overlooking a body of water, with atmospheric volumetric fog and cinematic lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy marsh path with wooden fences

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a marshy path toward distant lights, passing wooden fence posts on the right

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts and rails lining the right side of the marshy path
large ancient stone structure with tall walls visible through the fog
wet muddy terrain with puddles and sparse grass
warm glowing lights from torches or lamps visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy marsh path at night, with weathered wooden fences on the right and leafless trees in the distance. The stone castle ruins become visible ahead through the mist as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone castle ruins with lit windows

events.description: character approaches and walks alongside the large stone castle structure
character passes the stone structure and enters open grassland

agents.ego_description: walking past the stone castle ruins, moving from the marsh path into grassy terrain

entered.detail: warm light emanating from windows in the stone structure
transition from marsh to drier grass-covered ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the imposing stone castle ruins, passing lit windows that glow warmly in the fog. The wooden fences fall behind as the terrain transitions from marsh to grassy ground.

events.description: character begins ascending the grassy hill away from the castle

agents.ego_description: climbing up a grassy slope, moving away from the stone structure toward higher ground

entered.detail: rolling grass-covered terrain with patches of white flowers
boulder partially embedded in the grassy hillside
fog-covered water visible in the distance below the ridge

segments.scene_description: Leaving the castle behind, the character climbs a grassy hillside dotted with rocks and sparse vegetation. The terrain dries out as the elevation increases, revealing a foggy body of water in the distance below.

events.description: character reaches ridge top with panoramic view of foggy water

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy ridge edge overlooking the foggy water, hair blowing in the wind

entered.detail: wooden posts or pier structure visible across the water
grassy bank leading down to the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a grassy ridge with the water body now clearly visible on the right, shrouded in thick fog. Distant lights and wooden structures can be seen across the water as the character continues along the elevated path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy marshland that gradually ascends into an elevated ridge overlooking a misty body of water. It begins with the character walking along a marsh path lined with weathered wooden fences, moving toward the silhouette of stone castle ruins emerging from the night mist. As the character passes the imposing ruins, the warm glow of lit windows cuts through the fog and the terrain shifts from damp marsh to grassy ground. The scene then opens as the character climbs a rocky hillside, leaving the castle behind while the elevation increases to reveal a distant, fog-shrouded expanse of water below. Finally, the camera follows the character along a grassy ridge where the water becomes clearly visible on the right, revealing distant lights and wooden structures across the hazy horizon.
